text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the votes from her loyal and dedicated
fans, Matikanefukukitaru is able to race in the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wishing to return the favor however she can, she
makes a declaration to her kind supporters...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than depending on luck, she vows to rely
on her own strength instead.
